description: Black handbag with a double layered flap with a zippered pocket in it, press buttoned clasp for closure and a metallic brand badge on the front, box pleat and criss-cross stitch detail on the front for style, one short handle looped double for strength and carrying ease, one zippered compartment beneath the flap with a zipped pocket on one side and an organiser sleeve on the other side, one external pocket at the back with press buttoned closure
